Jekyll + Tailwind + Alpine.js

The ultimate lightweight, programmable static stack.

<button @click="open = !open" class="bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-700 text-white font-bold py-3 px-6 rounded-lg shadow-lg transform transition active:scale-95"> Test Alpine.js </button>
🚀 It works! Alpine.js and Tailwind are now synced.
